ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand associated with the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit identifier */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the brand */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., S, M, L, XL) */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length in cm */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in cm */,
  "top_length" INTEGER /* Length of the top in cm */,
  "bottom_length" INTEGER /* Length of the bottom in cm */,
  "shoulder_width" INTEGER /* Shoulder width in cm */,
  "hip_length" INTEGER /* Hip length in cm */,
  "inseam_length" INTEGER /* Inseam length in cm */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Chest measurement in cm */,
  "arm_hole" INTEGER /* Arm hole measurement in cm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-size relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size available for the product */,
  "fit" TEXT /* Fit type (e.g., regular, slim, relaxed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of inventory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of each unit in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order from which the product is returned */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being returned */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the product being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was initiated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "return_method" TEXT /* Method of return (e.g., mail, in-store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "fit_feedback" TEXT /* Fit feedback (e.g., fits well, too small, too large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order (if applicable) */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., sizing, quality, delivery) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, resolved, in progress) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "shipping_provider" TEXT /* Shipping provider (e.g., UPS, FedEx) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., shipped, delivered) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_tracking_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
